creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
From <https://docs.kde.org/trunk5/en/kde-workspace/kcontrol/plasma-pa/index.html>: 

> … Audio Volume provides the user with a mechanism to control the volume of 
> devices and applications using the PulseAudio sound system. …

> … The Audio Volume Plasma Widget is automatically loaded in the 
> system tray area. …

Whether that was the origin of the 'Audio Volume' widget (in the screenshots), I don't know. The 4-core HP EliteBook 8570p with which I found the bug is unexpectedly partially destroyed and I don't know whether data will be retrievable. 

----

Not reproducible with a relatively clean installation of 13.0-CURRENT on a 2-core 8570p with pulseaudio 12.2_2; I can't get the same widget. 

----

Side note: neither can I get a localised interface, but that's beyond the scope of this bug (I'm glancing at bug 221916 …).
